'''Darth Revan's flagship''' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]], who commanded the military forces of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] from this vessel during the [[Jedi Civil War]] as of [[3957 BBY]].

==History==
[[File:Revanconfronted.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Bastila Shan]] and her [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] companions confront [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] on the bridge, prior to [[Darth Malak]]'s betrayal]]
When [[Bastila Shan]], accompanied by several [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and at least one Republic soldier [[Capture of Darth Revan|confronted]] Revan on the bridge of his ship, the latter's [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Darth Malak]], betrayed his [[Sith Master/Legends|master]] by ordering his own forces to open fire, hoping to eliminate the Jedi and Revan both. Not all went according to plan, however, as Bastila survived and was able to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to save the spark of life that still lay within the dying Revan. With his mind nearly destroyed by injuries suffered from the bombardment, he was captured by the Jedi and whisked to the safety of the [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] [[Jedi Enclave]]. The ship was destroyed soon afterward.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}}
